summary: Tested Import/Export API and Investment Comparison features. All 13 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend pages load correctly with all UI elements functional. Navigation links properly placed.
passed_tests: GET /api/strategic/asset-classes - Returns 6 asset classes (au_shares, international_shares, property, crypto, bonds, cash)
GET /api/strategic/tax-structures - Returns 4 tax structures (personal, company, trust, smsf)
POST /api/strategic/investment-comparison - Returns comparison results with best_overall, best_by_asset_class, best_by_tax_structure
POST /api/strategic/investment-comparison - Full comparison returns 24 results (6 assets × 4 structures), sorted by after_tax_return
GET /api/import/template/client?format=json - Returns client template with 6 sections (personal, employment, assets, liabilities, goals, insurance)
GET /api/import/template/adviser?format=json - Returns adviser template
GET /api/import/template/client?format=csv - Returns CSV file
GET /api/import/template/client?format=xlsx - Returns Excel file
GET /api/export/clients - Returns 404 (no data) or client data
GET /api/export/advisers - Returns 404 (no data) or adviser data
GET /api/import/template/invalid - Returns 400 error correctly
GET /api/health - Returns healthy status
GET /api/ - Returns API info
Investment Comparison page loads at /investment-comparison
Investment Comparison - Page title 'Investment Structure Comparison' visible
Investment Comparison - Investment Parameters form with Amount, Holding Period slider, Marginal Tax Rate
Investment Comparison - Asset Classes selection (6 options with checkboxes)
Investment Comparison - Tax Structures selection (4 options with checkboxes)
Investment Comparison - Run Analysis button works
Investment Comparison - Results show 'Best Overall Option' with after-tax return
Investment Comparison - Bar chart 'After-Tax Returns by Asset Class & Structure' displayed
Investment Comparison - Three tabs: Comparison, Best Options, Detailed Results
Data Import/Export page loads at /data-import-export
Data Import/Export - Import Data and Export Data tabs
Data Import/Export - Select Data Type (Client Data, Adviser Data)
Data Import/Export - Download Template buttons (CSV, Excel, JSON)
Data Import/Export - File upload area with drag & drop
Data Import/Export - Import Data button
Data Import/Export - Export Format selection (XLSX, CSV, JSON)
Data Import/Export - Export Clients and Export Advisers buttons
Navigation - 'Investment Compare' link under PLANNING section
Navigation - 'Import / Export' link under DATA & REPORTS section
Navigation - Both links navigate to correct pages
context_for_next_testing_agent: Investment Comparison and Data Import/Export features fully tested and working. Investment Comparison page at /investment-comparison allows comparing investment outcomes across 6 asset classes and 4 tax structures. Data Import/Export page at /data-import-export supports CSV, JSON, Excel formats for client and adviser data. All backend APIs working correctly. Compliance modal appears on first visit - set localStorage key 'wheeler_compliance_acknowledged' to bypass.
